errorBoundary.panelGeneric: An unexpected error occurred in this panel.

app.name: Lyricist Pro
app.tagline: A professional-grade AI lyrics editor designed for songwriters and poets. Create your masterpiece with real-time suggestions, structure management, and intelligent quantization.

leftPanel.title: Lyricist Pro
leftPanel.suggestTooltip: Suggest a random topic, mood and title

emptyState.title: Ready to write your next masterpiece?
emptyState.description: Set up your song parameters in the sidebar or import existing lyrics to get started.

markupMode.title: Markdown mode
markupMode.hint: Format: [Section Name] followed by lyrics. Separate sections with double line breaks.

textMode.title: Text mode
textMode.hint: Write freely without formatting. Your text will be preserved when switching modes.

phoneticMode.title: Phonetic mode
phoneticMode.description: Pure IPA rendering of your lyrics
phoneticMode.hint: Generated with the selected language or dialect: {lang}
phoneticMode.placeholder: Phonetic transcription appears here once lyrics are available.

editor.regenerateWarning: This will completely regenerate the current lyrics. Do you want to continue?
editor.adaptLine: Adapt this line to the target language

suggestions.title: AI Suggestions
suggestions.empty: Select a line to explore AI alternatives.

musical.title: Musical prompt generator
musical.description: Define the soundscape of your lyrics
musical.instrumentationPlaceholder: e.g. Warm analog synths, acoustic guitar, heavy 808s...
musical.rhythmPlaceholder: e.g. Steady 4/4 pulse, syncopated groove, half-time feel...
musical.narrativePlaceholder: e.g. Cinematic build, melancholic introspection, anthemic release...
musical.autoSuggestLabel: AI suggestions based on your lyrics, topic and mood
musical.promptPlaceholder: Your structured musical prompt (STYLE, MOOD, VOCALS, INSTRUMENTATION, RHYTHM, STRUCTURE, MIX/SPACE, REFERENCES, DELIVERY) will appear here...
musical.promptStructureHint: Keep the musical prompt labeled (STYLE, MOOD, VOCALS, INSTRUMENTATION, RHYTHM, STRUCTURE, MIX/SPACE, REFERENCES, DELIVERY) so AI tools don't miss critical context.
musical.optimizedFor: Optimized for Lyria, Udio and Stable Audio
musical.contextInfo: Context: lyrics, topic and mood are taken into account
musical.vibeBoardDescription: Select your genre to automatically set BPM and instruments

lyria.noParams: No params set — configure them in the musical params panel above.
lyria.vocalStylePlaceholder: e.g. female lead, smooth, West African
lyria.negativePromptHint: Genres, instruments or moods Lyria should keep out of the mix.
lyria.negativePromptPlaceholder: e.g. heavy metal, distorted guitar, screaming
lyria.lyricsRequired: Write some lyrics in the editor first.
lyria.lyricsRequiredHint: Lyria needs at least one line of lyrics to generate audio.
lyria.infoTooltip: Generates a ~30s audio clip based on your lyrics and musical style. Engine: Lyria 3 Clip via Gemini API. SynthID watermarked audio.
lyria.errorAuth: The Lyria proxy refused this request (401).
lyria.errorAuthHint: If you are on a custom domain, redeploy after this fix or set LYRIA_INTERNAL_TOKEN on the server and VITE_LYRIA_INTERNAL_TOKEN on the client.
lyria.errorRateLimit: Too many requests — Lyria temporarily rate-limited this device.
lyria.errorRateLimitHint: Wait a moment, then try again. Lower frequency or share a single preview across edits.
lyria.errorTimeout: Lyria took too long to respond.
lyria.errorTimeoutHint: Retry in a moment. If it persists, the upstream model may be overloaded.
lyria.errorServerHint: Check the Vercel function logs for /api/lyria/generate. The upstream model may be unavailable.
lyria.errorNetwork: Could not reach the Lyria proxy.
lyria.errorNetworkHint: Check your connection and try again.

analysis.title: Song analysis report
analysis.musicalSuggestionsMovedHint: Musical suggestions available in the Musical tab

similarity.title: Similarity check
similarity.subtitle: Top 3 songs found with similarity score.
similarity.empty: No saved songs exceeded the 50% similarity threshold.
similarity.noCandidates: Save or generate at least one song version to compare similarities.
similarity.thresholdHint: Songs are ordered from most to least similar, regardless of score.
similarity.webIdle: No search performed. The engine fires automatically after 30s of inactivity (≥ 20% text change), or click Refresh.
similarity.webNoMatches: ✓ No significant external matches found. Your lyrics appear original.

saveToLibrary.title: Library
saveToLibrary.saveDescription: Add this song to your personal library
saveToLibrary.browseDescription: Open your library and manage saved songs
saveToLibrary.empty: No songs in library. Save this song to start your collection.
saveToLibrary.loadDescription: Load this song into the editor
saveToLibrary.storageScopeLocal: Library data covers lyricist_library only. Usage and limit are global browser estimates where available.
saveToLibrary.purgeWarning: This will permanently delete all songs from your library. This action cannot be undone.

paste.title: Paste Lyrics
paste.description: Paste your existing lyrics below. Our AI will analyze them to extract structure, rhyme scheme, syllable count and key concepts to integrate into the editor.

importDialog.title: Load lyrics
importDialog.emptyDescription: Choose a .txt or .md file to analyze and import into the editor.
importDialog.replaceDescription: Imported lyrics will replace the current lyrics, structure and analysis context.
importDialog.warning: Your current work will be lost once the imported file is analyzed.
importDialog.supportedFiles: Supports TXT, Markup, ODT, DOCX or pasted lyrics

exportDialog.title: Save / Export lyrics
exportDialog.description: Choose a single format for this export.

share.label: Share
share.description: Copy a public link to share this song.

keyboardShortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
keyboardShortcuts.description: Reference of active shortcuts available in Lyricist Pro.

shortcuts.undo: Undo the latest change outside text inputs.
shortcuts.redo: Redo the last undone change outside text fields.
shortcuts.dismissNavigation: Close the settings, about, similarity or mobile side panels.
shortcuts.dismissFileDialogs: Close import, export, versions or library dialogs.
shortcuts.dismissAiDialogs: Close AI prompts, API alerts, analyses or pasted lyrics import dialogs.
shortcuts.openSearch: Open the search and replace panel.

about.description: A professional-grade AI lyrics editor designed for songwriters and poets. Create your masterpiece with real-time suggestions, structure management, and intelligent quantization.

aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
aiAssistant.onboarding: What would you like to know or do?
aiAssistant.placeholder: Ask anything about your lyrics or composition…
aiAssistant.error: Unable to get a response. Please try again.

tooltips.aiUnavailableHelp: Set GEMINI_API_KEY in your Vercel project environment variables (Settings → Environment Variables) and redeploy.
tooltips.quantize: Adjust all lines to match the target syllable count while maintaining meaning
tooltips.analyzeTheme: Analyze song structure, rhyme quality and emotional impact
tooltips.regenerate: Rewrite the entire song based on current settings and topic
tooltips.addSection: Add a section to the structure
tooltips.removeSection: Remove a section from the structure
tooltips.normalizeStructure: Reorder sections according to standard structure: Intro → Verse/Pre-chorus/Chorus → Bridge → Outro
tooltips.generateSong: Generate a new song with AI
tooltips.quantizeSection: Adjust lines in this section to match the syllable target
tooltips.adaptSong: Translate and adapt the entire song to {lang} (creative adaptation, not literal translation)
tooltips.sectionAdapt: Adapt this section to the selected language
tooltips.applyAnalysis: Apply selected improvements to the song
tooltips.generateMusical: Generate a musical prompt for AI music tools
tooltips.checkSimilarity: Compare this song with saved versions and show closest matches
tooltips.removeFromLibraryItem: Remove this song from the library
tooltips.moodPresets: Choose a preset mood for your song
tooltips.rhymeScheme: Select the default rhyme scheme for all sections
tooltips.targetSyllables: Set the target syllable count per line
tooltips.viewMode: Toggle between different lyrics editing modes
tooltips.browseLibrary: Save or browse your song library
tooltips.sendToLyria: Open the Musical tab to generate a preview with Lyria

promptModal.saveVersionMessage: Enter a name for this version:

rhythmicCoherence.title: Rhythmic coherence check
rhythmicCoherence.optionADescription: Adjust tempo/style of the musical prompt to match lyrics density.
rhythmicCoherence.optionBDescription: View lines that are too long and shorten them.
